author: imaikosuke
description: Sync local note images to Cloudflare R2. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: imaikosuke
manifest.description: Sync local note images to Cloudflare R2.
manifest.name: Cloudflare R2 Sync

name: Cloudflare R2 Sync

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- ci: generate GitHub artifact attestations for `main.js` and `styles.css` via `actions/attest-build-provenance@v4` before uploading release assets
- docs: README version badge updated to 1.0.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- fix: plugin **id** changed from `cloudflare-r2-sync` to `cloudflare-images-sync` to satisfy Obsidian manifest rules (IDs may contain only lowercase letters and hyphens — no digits)
- docs: README version badge updated to 1.0.1

**Migration (local installs only):** If you installed manually, rename `.obsidian/plugins/cloudflare-r2-sync` to `.obsidian/plugins/cloudflare-images-sync` and reinstall from this release, or disable the old plugin folder and enable the new one.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- release: **1.0.0** — first stable release for the Obsidian community plugin directory
- chore: update dependencies in `package.json` and `pnpm-lock.yaml`
- chore: GitHub release workflow — upload only `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` (no ZIP artifact)
- docs: README version badge updated to 1.0.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- feat: optional **Sync preview before upload** — review upload targets, object keys, and public URLs in a modal before **Auto-upload on drop**, **Sync images to r2**, or **Upload cover image**; upload only selected images
- feat: object key template placeholders `{slug}`, `{notepath}`, `{hash}`, and `{uuid}` for article and cover uploads, with grouped placeholder help and live examples in settings
- feat: optional WebP conversion for cover images before upload, with a quality slider shown only when conversion is enabled
- docs: README — sync preview, cover WebP conversion, and expanded object key template documentation

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- feat: optional WebP conversion for article images before upload  
- feat: show WebP quality only when article image conversion is enabled  
- docs: README — image conversion options and article upload error reporting  
- feat: configurable YAML frontmatter key for cover image URLs and related image handling

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- feat: Sync local images in the active Markdown note to Cloudflare R2 (S3-compatible API) and rewrite `![]()` / `![[...]]` links to URLs under the configured public base URL.
- feat: Build object keys from a path template with `{year}`, `{month}`, `{day}`, `{hour}`, `{minute}`, `{second}`, `{timestamp}`, and sanitized `{filename}`.
- feat: Optional separate object key template for cover uploads (falls back to the article template when empty).
- feat: Idempotent uploads via conditional `PutObject` (`If-None-Match: *`) so existing keys are not overwritten; surface “already exists” when the key collides.
- feat: Trash local image attachments after a successful upload, with per-run counts in notices.
- feat: Optional WebP encoding for PNG, JPEG, and BMP (slider quality 0.5–1); GIF, ICO, SVG, and WebP upload without conversion.
- feat: Optional “auto-upload on drop”: intercept editor image drops, upload to R2, insert `![](publicUrl)` at the drop position; on failure (or WebP failure), save as a normal vault attachment and link locally.
- feat: Ribbon icon and command palette action: **Sync images to r2** for the current note.
- feat: **Upload cover image**: file picker (PNG), upload to R2, set `cover` in YAML frontmatter to the public URL.
- feat: **Delete r2 images**: list images in the note whose URLs match the public base URL, confirm in a modal, delete selected objects from R2, remove those links from the note.
- feat: Settings UI for account ID, bucket, public base URL, templates, upload **Cache-Control** presets (1y immutable / 1y / 24h / 1h / revalidate), WebP quality, auto-upload on drop, and detailed error notices.
- feat: Detailed error notices with categorized R2/SDK hints (optional) for support and debugging.
- feat: R2 **access key ID** and **secret access key** stored in Obsidian **Secret Storage**, referenced by secret name in settings.
- feat: Load-time migration from legacy `objectKeyPrefix` to the new object key template format.
- feat: Desktop-only plugin (`isDesktopOnly`); image formats handled in note body include bmp, gif, ico, jpeg, jpg, png, svg, webp (remote `http(s)` targets are not treated as sync candidates).
